name: Manic Macho Legs Cat
description: Manic Macho Legs Cat, fell into a tub of black licorish, enhansed the beauty of his legs and power of his long distance attacks, popularity is down though, now with fire based attacks.

moves.name: 🔥 Manic Foot
moves.desc: A fireball attack with a chance to burn creates several explosions.

moves.name: ⚔️ Fury of Feet
moves.desc: A lightning-fast claw swipe. No frills.

moves.name: Fire Foot
moves.desc: kicks out with foot random chance of damage
